key.name: height-ratio
key.summary: Pane height as a fraction of monitor height
key.description: The drop-down pane occupies this fraction of the monitor's height. Clamped to 0.20–0.95.

key.name: last-note
key.summary: Filename of the last open note
key.description: When the daemon starts, it opens this note in the editor. Empty string means "open the default scratch note".

key.name: animate
key.summary: Whether to animate the pane on show
key.description: If true, the pane height animates from 1px to its target over ~180ms when shown. If false, the pane appears at full size immediately.
